race.description: Annabelle Cleeland Member For Euroa (62) Hcp
race.comment: Siding with GEESEVEN (2) who presents third-up off a narrow maiden win at Pakenham last time, sent out the $1.80 favourite and just doing enough to score, finding the line strongly over 1400m. He's a promising horse who should relish the rise to a mile and draws nicely for the in-form Billy Egan. WINGS OF CARMEN (6) can mix his form but is another way down in grade out of the Wagga Cup. He can figure in the finish. PHAROAH'S DAUGHTER (11) won well at Wangaratta last time in a 0-56 after riding the speed. She doesn't win out of turn but gets a nice map here and can run another honest race. TORN (4) couldn't get into the race at Pakenham last start but his prior form in town is rock solid for this and he can be running on if the tempo suits.
